page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: Comparing runs of oxford nanopore sequencing data and alignments
page_metadata.biotools__summary: Compare multiple runs of long read sequencing data and alignments. Creates violin plots or box plots of length, quality and percent identity and creates dynamic, overlaying read length histograms and a cumulative yield plot.
